items.claim: Paneda looks aged significantly and appears physically diminished with no muscle.
items.quote: Paneda looks like he's aged 25 years since he... He's hunched over. He has no muscle.

items.claim: Paneda holds a stylistic advantage and acts as kryptonite to Braga, having his number.
items.quote: just has the has his number. just he's his kryptonite. He's Bra's kryptonite.

items.claim: Braga is considered the better fighter compared to Paneda, despite the head-to-head matchup result.
items.quote: Who's the better fighter, him or Braa? ... Braa. Not close.
